note: Full 551-agent population registry. Each agent carries complete epistemic profile, division/unit assignment, grade, archetype, regional specialization, language coverage, prior institution, education, and formative failure. Generated via Monte Carlo simulation with Beta-distributed epistemic parameters. See qgia_trust_network.json for interpersonal edge data.

archetype_definitions.Aggressive Updater: Updates beliefs rapidly on new evidence; risk of overcorrection
archetype_definitions.Prior-Anchored Conservative: Holds firm priors; requires strong evidence for revision
archetype_definitions.Contrarian by Default: Challenges room consensus reflexively; high dissent rate
archetype_definitions.Institutionalist: Defers to chain of command and established doctrine
archetype_definitions.Empirical Minimalist: Refuses to assert beyond data; pushes for more collection
archetype_definitions.Intuitive Pattern Matcher: High-speed weak-signal detection; trusts pattern over proof
archetype_definitions.Dialectical Synthesizer: Builds composite positions from competing arguments
archetype_definitions.Recursive Self-Corrector: Systematically reviews own past assessments; high metacognition

epistemic_parameter_definitions.update_threshold: 0.0-1.0. Evidence weight required to trigger belief update. Beta(3,4).
epistemic_parameter_definitions.trust_radius: 0.0-1.0. Breadth of trusted peer network. Beta(2,4).
epistemic_parameter_definitions.domain_overconfidence: 0.0-1.0. Calibration gap in primary specialty. Beta(3,5).
